description: A room where an artist, photographer, or musician works; a space dedicated to creative work. 'Phaewi' names where art emerges—light arranged, materials waiting, creativity invited.
sound_symbolism: The word opens to creation. 'Pha' /ɸa/ begins with generative breath, creativity stirring. The vowel 'e' opens to possibility. Then 'wi' welcomes with expansive space, studio ready.
grammatical_notes: Functions as a noun: 'lo phaewi' (the studio). Related to 'shoruka' (workshop) but emphasizes artistic creation rather than practical craft.

pillars.art-nouveau-aesthetics: Studios birthed beauty—spaces where artists developed the flowing forms and natural motifs of the movement.
pillars.solarpunk-values: Studios nurture vision—spaces where the imagination of better futures takes visible form.
